classification.cautionReason: Conciliar or creedal material received in mainstream Nicene Christian tradition, with denominational differences on some canons.

metadata.author: The Canons of the Council in Trullo; Often Called The Quinisext Council

title: Canon LXXXVI.

verses.book: The Canons of the Council in Trullo.
verses.text: Those who to the destruction of their own souls procure and bring up harlots, if they be clerics, they are to be [cut off and] deposed, if laymen to be cut off.

verses.book: The Canons of the Council in Trullo.
The Canons of the Council in Trullo.
verses.text: Whoever gathers together harlots to the ruin of souls, shall be cut off.

verses.book: The Canons of the Council in Trullo.
verses.text: The brackets enclose the reading of Hervetus.

verses.book: The Canons of the Council in Trullo.
verses.text: But Zonaras had this same text, and therefore it may be safely followed instead of that of Balsamon, as edited by Beveridge.
